topics: Block Diagram of 8051 - Program Status Word (PSW), Accumulator, Program Counter
Memory Organization - RAM and ROM, Register Banks and Stack, Special Function Registers (SFRs)
Classification of Instruction Set - Data Transfer Group, Arithmetic Group, Logical Group, Branching Group
Addressing Modes - Types, Accessing Data from Internal and External Memory
Introduction to 8051 Assembly Language Programming, Data Types and Directives
Concept of Subroutine and Software Delay Programming
Programming 8051 Using Embedded C Language: Introduction and Advantages
Timer Registers - Timer0, Timer1, Configuration of Timer Registers
Timer Mode Programming and Counter Mode
Serial Communication in 8051 - Modes and Protocols, RS-232 Pin Configuration and Connection
Serial Port Programming - Transmitting and Receiving
Programming the Interrupts - External, Timer and Serial Port Interrupts, Interrupt Priority Settings

Suggested Project Topics Using 8051 Microcontroller: (1) Interface ADC chip to 8051 and read variation in voltage from potentiometer and display on LCD module; (2) Interface DAC chip to 8051 and generate sine waveform of 1 kHz at any port pin; (3) DC motor interface for speed and direction control; (4) Stepper motor interface with unit step control, rotation angle control, speed control, and direction control; (5) Read temperature sensor and display on LCD
